'''pangasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdle|bdle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdle|bdle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pangasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængæshæth|pængæshæth]] || [[word:pængæshæj|pængæshæj]] || [[word:pængæshæsh|pængæshæsh]] || [[word:pængæshæ|pængæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangangashath|pangangashath]] || [[word:pangangashaj|pangangashaj]] || [[word:pangangashash|pangangashash]] || [[word:pangangasha|pangangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangashath|pangashath]] || [[word:pangashaj|pangashaj]] || [[word:pangashash|pangashash]] || [[word:pangasha|pangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafshath|pangafshath]] || [[word:pangafshaj|pangafshaj]] || [[word:pangafshash|pangafshash]] || [[word:pangafshaf|pangafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pangashatha|pangashatha]] || [[word:pangashaja|pangashaja]] || [[word:pangashasha|pangashasha]] || [[word:pangashaka|pangashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pangashath|pangashath]] || [[word:pangashaj|pangashaj]] || [[word:pangashash|pangashash]] || [[word:pangasha|pangasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pangashathal|pangashathal]] || [[word:pangashajal|pangashajal]] || [[word:pangashashal|pangashashal]] || [[word:pangashakal|pangashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pangashathatha|pangashathatha]] || [[word:pangashajaja|pangashajaja]] || [[word:pangashashasha|pangashashasha]] || [[word:pangashaka|pangashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pangashathan|pangashathan]] || [[word:pangashajan|pangashajan]] || [[word:pangashashan|pangashashan]] || [[word:pangashakan|pangashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pangashathaoro|pangashathaoro]] || [[word:pangashajaoro|pangashajaoro]] || [[word:pangashashaoro|pangashashaoro]] || [[word:pangashakaoro|pangashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
